summary: spam-risk-reviewer is a bounded read-only runx skill for reviewing supplied campaign draft, list hygiene, and sender authentication posture before a separate send-as workflow continues. The public package was published, installed from the registry, exercised on synthetic inputs, and checked with a local dogfood receipt; it never sends email, reads live DNS, mints authority, or uses customer data.

observations.name: registry publish
observations.command: POST https://api.runx.ai/v1/skills using the spam-risk-reviewer package and harness

observations.name: clean install
observations.evidence: signed install succeeded with runx-registry-ed25519-v1 and digest sha256:04af3daac9439b5761cbf735a56f9bda4d94f4a19336819962445cec22a9dd89

observations.name: dogfood triage
observations.command: runx skill liomilet4-png/spam-risk-reviewer@sha-659d3bb2acbd triage using synthetic low-risk campaign/list/auth inputs
observations.evidence: the skill requested structured agent answers without sending email or touching customer data

observations.name: receipt verify check
observations.evidence: digest and content address are valid; released verifier reports local-development signature_malformed for the local audit signature, so this evidence does not claim a trusted registry signature

observations.name: scope safety
observations.evidence: fixtures are synthetic; the skill does not call public_send, live DNS, private services, wallet, payment, or customer data

dogfood.input_scope: synthetic campaign draft, synthetic list metadata, and synthetic sender authentication posture

evidence_summary.authentication: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC all pass.
evidence_summary.routing: send-as preflight may continue; public_send remains owned by the separate send-as run.

escalation.reason: Low-risk supplied signals clear the reviewer gate only; no send action is performed.

windows_note.official_cli_resume_on_windows: blocked by existing Windows receipt-store directory sync error: os error 5
windows_note.pr_fix_scope: crates/runx-runtime/src/receipts/store.rs skips directory fsync on Windows while preserving file fsync and index rebuild
